'''Sera Faleur Darklighter''' was [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who was born on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Chandrila/Legends|Chandrila]], growing up near the [[Silver Sea/Legends|Silver Sea]]. She worked as a social worker and eventually met [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Gavin Darklighter]]. The two [[Marriage/Legends|married]] a few [[Standard year|years]] after the [[Battle of Bilbringi (9 ABY)|Battle of Bilbringi]] (around [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]]).

Sera and Gavin had five children together. First they adopted two boys who were orphans of the campaign against [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]]. Sera and Gavin also had three biological children of their own. They had a daughter before Gavin was promoted to [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] of [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] and later a son and a second daughter.
